title: Lily’s Kitchen Made with Natural Ingredients Adult Dog Treats Packet The Mighty Duck Mini Jerky for Small, Medium, Large Dogs 8 x 70g
features: Mighty in taste and made with natural ingredients and with freshly prepared meat and offal, this packet of jerky treats is for adult dogs from 4 months+
Featuring freshly prepared duck and oven baked for a lovely, chewy, flexible texture, these bite-sized treats are also made to a grain-free recipe* and are suitable for small, medium, large dogs
Take a look at our full dog food range, featuring organic, wholesome recipes, as well as options for all lifestages with recyclable packaging

As a B Corp company, we are committed to our target to be fully recyclable by 2025. To find out more about our sustainable initiatives, and how we use our business as a force for good! Visit our brand store
Here at Lily’s Kitchen, we make proper dog food and cat food made with natural ingredients and freshly prepared meat and offal. Only the best for your furry family

We have now updated our packaging information and made the material recyclable. Please check the pack for instructions. Note that you may receive a mixture of different packs during this transition period
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Explore some of our meaty treat recipes These tasty little bites are bursting with mouth-watering proper meat dogs can’t help but devour. Pork & Apple Made with freshly prepared pork and air-dried for a satisfyingly chewy texture, these delightful snack-size sausages are full of valuable protein for a simply delicious, natural treat. Discover Chicken Bites Made with freshly prepared chicken, we’ve added a sprinkling of quinoa (an energy and protein-rich seed) and a gentle dash of ginger (known to aid digestion) for a simply delicious, natural treat. Discover Duck Jerky Made with freshly prepared duck and gently oven baked for a lovely, chewy, flexible texture, this mini jerky is full of valuable protein and makes a simply delicious, natural treat. Discover Duck & Venison Made with freshly prepared duck and venison, and air-dried for a satisfyingly chewy texture, these delightful snack-size sausages are full of valuable protein for a simply delicious, natural treat. Discover Next page What's different about Lily's Kitchen Pet Food? We believe that all pets deserve proper food, so they can live their best lives. That’s why we make food packed full of proper meat and vibrant veg, that’s naturally wholesome and nutritious. Best of all it tastes incredible. Who has given Lily's Kitchen the paw of approval? Our vet-approved recipes are developed with pet nutritionists before we conduct tasting trials with our own Lily's Kitchen pets and from approved catteries and kennels. This is done to assess palatability, a bit like a restaurant review. How do I introduce my pet to Lily's Kitchen Food? We recommend that when introducing a new diet you do so gradually over around 5-7 days. This is so your pet’s digestive system can become accustomed to the new diet. specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Once opened, reseal tightly to keep them fresh and use within 14 days. Store in a cool, dry place. *Made in a factory that handles grains so traces may be present
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Natural, Grain-Free, High Protein, Freshly Prepared Meat and Offal
